skills.name: Boiling Water
skills.description: Learn how to boil water safely and effectively.
steps: Place the pot on the stove.
Turn on the heat to high.
Wait for the water to reach a rolling boil.
Turn off the heat and use the boiled water as needed.
safety: Always use oven mitts when handling hot pots.
Keep flammable materials away from the stove.

skills.name: Basic Knife Skills
skills.description: Learn how to handle a knife safely and effectively.
steps: Choose the right knife for the task.
Hold the knife properly with a firm grip.
Practice cutting vegetables with a stable cutting board.
Learn to slice, dice, and julienne.
safety: Always cut away from your body.
Keep your fingers tucked in while cutting.
